prompt: A handheld TV remote with a slim rectangular body and a hinged flip cover over the upper function buttons. The body carries a recessed button face on its front; the flip cover attaches at the top edge of the body on a revolute hinge. A rectangular battery door on the rear closes on a prismatic slide along the body's long axis. Two joints: one revolute for the flip cover, one prismatic for the battery door.
label: Remote controller — slim body flip cover revolute battery door prismatic

prompt: A universal remote with a telescoping antenna and a hinged rear battery compartment door. The rectangular body holds the button face; the antenna is a two-stage cylindrical rod that extends prismatically from the top edge of the body. The battery door is mounted on a revolute hinge at the door's long edge on the rear face. Two joints: one prismatic for the antenna, one revolute for the battery door.
label: Remote controller — rectangular body telescoping antenna prismatic battery door revolute

prompt: A four-wing revolving door set inside a cylindrical drum housing. A central vertical shaft carries four flat rectangular panel wings at equal 90-degree intervals, each wing spanning from floor to ceiling and reaching to the inner drum wall. The entire wing assembly rotates continuously about the central vertical axis.
label: Revolving door — four-wing cylindrical drum central shaft continuous rotation

prompt: A three-wing revolving door with a cylindrical outer drum and a low curved push-rail fixed to each wing panel. A central post carries three equal-spaced rectangular door panels radiating outward to the drum wall. The door assembly rotates continuously about the vertical post axis.
label: Revolving door — three-wing drum central post push-rails fixed continuous rotation
